name: Adventures of Lolo
description:
Adventures of Lolo is a puzzle game where the player controls Lolo, a small blue character, or Lala, a small pink character (in two-player mode). The goal of each level is to collect all the Heart Framers scattered throughout the room and then open the treasure chest to proceed to the next level. 

The levels are laid out as grid-based rooms containing various obstacles and enemies. Enemies wander predetermined paths, and touching an enemy results in instant death, forcing the player to restart the level. Some enemies can be temporarily defeated by shooting them with a magic shot. Magic shots are obtained by collecting special items such as shooting eggs. Lolo can only hold a finite amount of magic shots.

Other interactive elements in the levels include:
*   Emerald Framers: These block Lolo's movement until they are pushed, creating a new path or blocking an enemy.
*   Shooting Eggs: When collected, these grant Lolo magic shots.
*   Treasure Chest: This becomes accessible after all Heart Framers are collected, allowing the player to exit the level.
*   One-Way Arrows: These force Lolo to move in the indicated direction when stepped on.
*   Trees: These block both the player and enemy movement.
*   Water: This is impassable for the player, though enemies can sometimes traverse it.

The game increases in difficulty by introducing new enemies, more complex level designs, and limited magic shot availability. Some levels involve strategic manipulation of enemies and objects to create safe paths and solve the puzzle.

controls.arrow_up: Move Lolo up one grid space
controls.arrow_down: Move Lolo down one grid space
controls.arrow_left: Move Lolo left one grid space
controls.arrow_right: Move Lolo right one grid space
controls.space: Fire a magic shot in the direction Lolo is facing
